title: Lucia Caminos
text: Lucia Caminos is a character due to appear as one of the protagonists in Grand Theft Auto VI. Lucia debuts as the first major, non-selectable female protagonist with a voice actress. She is often erroneously described as the first female protagonist in the Grand Theft Auto series2; Lucia is the eighth female protagonist chronologically, following numerous silent and optional female protagonists in the first Grand Theft Auto, Grand Theft Auto 2 and Grand Theft Auto Online. Her voice actress is yet to be officially revealed. Lucia is a female criminal, serving her sentence at the Leonida Penitentiary in Vice-Dale County, Leonida, in the mid-2020s for an unspecified crime. At the time of her incarceration, it appears that Stefanie was assigned as her correctional social worker. As per the context of the first trailer showing Lucia and Jason robbing various places across the State of Leonida, the duo appears to be inspired by the real-life American criminals Bonnie and Clyde, the former being also previously used as the inspiration for Catalina in the 3D Universe of the Grand Theft Auto series. Trailer 1 Lucia wearing prison attire at Stefanie's office inside the Leonida Penitentiary. Lucia holding a stack of money in the passenger seat of a Tulip. Lucia walking through Uncle Jack's Liquor with Jason. Lucia embracing Jason in a room at the Starlet Motel. Lucia and Jason preparing to rob Uncle Jack's Liquor.
